_comment: OpenAI Chat Completions response sequence for 'iterate once' scenario.
_scenario: Model drafts spintax → calls lint (fails) → revises → calls lint again (passes) → emits final body.

_sequence._description: Model calls lint_spintax with first draft (will fail lint in test)

function.name: lint_spintax
function.arguments: {"spintax_body": "{Hey {firstName},|Hi {firstName},|Hello {firstName},|Hey there,|{firstName},}\n\n{Short.|Variation two is a bit longer here.|Variation three goes here today.|Variation four check length now.|Variation five last one done.}"}

_sequence._description: After lint returns passed=false, model revises and calls lint again

function.name: lint_spintax
function.arguments: {"spintax_body": "{Hey {firstName},|Hi {firstName},|Hello {firstName},|Hey there,|{firstName},}\n\n{Short variation right here.|Variation two is a bit longer here.|Variation three goes here today.|Variation four check length now.|Variation five last one done.}"}

_sequence._description: After second lint returns passed=true, model emits final body

message.content:
{Hey {firstName},|Hi {firstName},|Hello {firstName},|Hey there,|{firstName},}

{Short variation right here.|Variation two is a bit longer here.|Variation three goes here today.|Variation four check length now.|Variation five last one done.}
